nodes.label: Template Native Tasks: Deploy Native LXC App
Lab Maintenance Scripts Pattern (lab-update-check, lab-restart-app, lab-tail-applog)
nodes.rationale: Each native app role ships three scripts to /usr/local/bin/. Template has no-op placeholders; each real app role replaces them with working implementations. This allows maintenance playbooks (restart-app.yml, tail-applog.yml, check-native-updates.yml) to call a stable interface across all apps without knowing app-specific details.
